response: {"name":"Public CLIP Database and iCLIP data processing","description":"Processing of publicly available CLIP-seq datasets (iCLIP, HITS-CLIP, PAR-CLIP) downloaded from SRA/ERA, using an eCLIP-seq-like pipeline with protocol-specific adaptations for adapter trimming, PCR duplicate removal, and peak calling.","data_type":"sequencing","raw_data_source":"SRA/ERA (accessions listed in Supplementary Table 1)","steps":[{"step_number":1,"description":"Download raw CLIP-seq data (iCLIP, HITS-CLIP, PAR-CLIP) from publicly available repositories.","input_data":"Public CLIP-seq dataset accessions listed in Supplementary Table 1","output_data":"Raw sequencing reads (FASTQ files)","software":"SRA Toolkit / ERA download tools","software_version":null,"parameters":{},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":2,"description":"Perform adapter trimming on raw reads using cutadapt, applied once (single-pass, unlike eCLIP which may trim multiple times).","input_data":"Raw FASTQ reads","output_data":"Adapter-trimmed FASTQ reads","software":"cutadapt","software_version":null,"parameters":{"trimming_passes":"1"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":3,"description":"Align trimmed reads to the reference genome (as per eCLIP pipeline).","input_data":"Adapter-trimmed FASTQ reads","output_data":"Aligned reads (BAM files)","software":"STAR","software_version":null,"parameters":{},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":4,"description":"Filter datasets to retain only those with at least 100,000 uniquely mapped reads; discard datasets below this threshold.","input_data":"Aligned BAM files","output_data":"Filtered BAM files meeting read-depth threshold","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"min_uniquely_mapped_reads":"100000"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":5,"description":"Remove PCR duplicates using protocol-specific strategies: for iCLIP, random-mers (UMIs) are extracted from reads and used for duplicate removal; for HITS-CLIP and PAR-CLIP, reads sharing the same mapping start position are treated as PCR duplicates and removed.","input_data":"Filtered BAM files","output_data":"PCR-duplicate-removed BAM files","software":null,"software_version":null,"parameters":{"iCLIP_method":"random-mer (UMI)-based duplicate removal","HITS-CLIP_method":"same start position = PCR duplicate, remove","PAR-CLIP_method":"same start position = PCR duplicate, remove"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":6,"description":"Perform peak calling on non-duplicate reads using CLIPper, as per the eCLIP pipeline.","input_data":"PCR-duplicate-removed BAM files (non-duplicate reads only)","output_data":"Called peaks (CLIPper peak BED/output files)","software":"CLIPper","software_version":null,"parameters":{"input_reads":"non-duplicate reads only"},"code_reference":null},{"step_number":7,"description":"Generate usable read density plots and smoothed kernel density histograms to assess data quality and read distributions.","input_data":"Non-duplicate aligned BAM files / read count data","output_data":"Usable read density plots and smoothed kernel density histogram figures","software":"Matlab","software_version":null,"parameters":{"package":"distributionPlot","settings":"default"},"code_reference":null}],"figures_produced":["Figure 1","Figure 1a","Figure 1b","Figure 1b–c","Figure 1d","Figure 2","Figure 2a","Figure 2b","Figure 2c","Figure 2d","Figure 2e","Figure 3","Figure 3a","Figure 3a–b","Figure 3b","Figure 3c","Figure 3d","Figure 3e","Figure 3f","Figure 4","Figure 4a","Figure 4a–d","Figure 4b","Figure 4c–d"]}
